summary: Good‑enough recording captures a psychedelic 1986 gem – Crazy Fingers opens the set and feeds into a monster jam sandwich of Playing In The Band, drums, space, The Other One and China Doll.
review: Fans rave about this April 19 1986 show as one of the band’s most trippy moments, highlighting an opening Crazy Fingers that launches a 22‑minute jam featuring Playing In The Band, intense drums/space, a soaring The Other One and an eerie China Doll.  No technical complaints are noted, suggesting the sound is clear enough to enjoy the psychedelic mood.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are 4‑5 stars and praise the performance; no recording issues are reported, yielding a strong combined score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers do not mention any sound problems, implying the audio is listenable and without major flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A concise 22‑minute sequence that rolls from Crazy Fingers into a jam sandwich (Playing In The Band → Drums → Space) and culminates in an intense The Other One leading to China Doll, keeping the energy high throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as being in a psychedelic mood with strong playing; his guitar work helps drive the jam.
band_member_comments.Drums: The drum/space segment is highlighted as an intense, “jam sandwich” centerpiece.
